base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_carmilla_mask_variants — a character (boss) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Carmilla — pale mask + orange-mask variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Carmilla — pale mask + orange-mask variants; mansion boss. Spawns from the floating-mask mechanic
